name: restaurant back-office teams processing 10-20 payrolls/month tool
description: For restaurant back-office teams processing 10-20 payrolls/month, manual reconciliation causes payroll inaccuracies. We automate payroll reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate payroll due to manual reconciliation of timesheets and sales data.
